title: Constraint Mastery Game
genericDescription: Turn constraint into style; prove control over scope; avoid filler.
specificDescription: Build a game under a severe constraint chosen from one screen, one minute, one input, one color plus neutrals, one enemy, one room, or one resource. Explain why the constraint improves the work.
gradingRubric: 30 pts constraint use; 20 pts design elegance; 20 pts complete play; 15 pts polish; 15 pts statement.
